title: Agent Skill frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a SKILL.md against the agentskills.io open standard plus Nekko Dojo submission rules.

name.description: Lowercase letters, digits and single hyphens; 1-64 chars; must match the skill's directory name.

description.description: What the skill does AND when to use it, written in the third person. 1-1024 chars.

allowed-tools.description: Space-separated pre-approved tools. A grant, not a sandbox — keep it minimal. Bare 'Bash' / 'Bash(*)' is rejected by the security lint.

metadata.description: Arbitrary string map. Conventionally carries author, version, category, tags.
